SEARCH
Package common.dto

Class VisitsReportRow

java.lang.Object
common.dto.VisitsReportRow
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class VisitsReportRow extends Object implements Serializable
One grouped row of the Visits-by-Type report: the aggregate figures for a single visitor category over the report's date range and park filter.

Categories collapse the three booking VisitTypes into the two the department manager reports on: "GROUPS" for VisitType.GROUP visits and "INDIVIDUALS" for VisitType.INDIVIDUAL and VisitType.FAMILY together.

visitCount counts every visit in the category (open or closed), but avgStayMinutes averages only the visits that have been checked out — an open visit (no exited_at) contributes to the count yet has no stay length to average. A category with no visits at all is zero-filled (visitCount = 0, avgStayMinutes = 0).

Built server-side by ReportDAO.visitsByType(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.Integer) and shipped inside a VisitsReportDTO; immutable and Serializable.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • VisitsReportRow

      public VisitsReportRow(String category, int visitCount, double avgStayMinutes)
      Creates a fully populated report row.
      Parameters:
      category - visitor category ("INDIVIDUALS" or "GROUPS")
      visitCount - number of visits in this category (open and closed)
      avgStayMinutes - average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed)

  • Method Details

    • getCategory

      public String getCategory()
      Returns:
      the visitor category ("INDIVIDUALS" or "GROUPS")

      public int getVisitCount()
      Returns:
      the number of visits in this category (open and closed)

    • getAvgStayMinutes

      public double getAvgStayMinutes()
      Returns:
      the average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed)
